Ready-to-eat pork deli meat product. Production date 2026-01-20. Distributed to retail deli locations in Illinois and Indiana — some deli purchases may show producer brand only without affected date.
rows.Reason: Public Health Alert — Listeria monocytogenes contamination. Recall not requested because products no longer available for purchase. Discovered as part of ongoing illness outbreak investigation: localized Lm outbreak in Illinois with 3 confirmed sick people; Illinois Department of Public Health leading the investigation with FSIS and local IL health departments.
rows.Notes: USDA FSIS Public Health Alert dated 2026-05-09. Outbreak: 3 sick people in Illinois, Lm cluster, IL Dept of Public Health leading with FSIS. EST. 21406; production date 2026-01-20; USE BY MAR 26 2026. Manually added 2026-05-10 — USDA FSIS scraper AND gap-finder cascade both missed this PHA (audit gap).
